Among Black families, maternal work hours decreased and time spent with children on early learning activities increased, with no effect on child-focused expenditures. Marginal propensities to consume child-specific goods from different income sources also varied: Estimates showed a higher marginal propensity to consume child-specific goods from government income than from maternal income among Latino families, and the opposite among Black families. Latino families’ responses to the unconditional cash transfer and to government income are consistent with the notion that signals regarding intended use of income influence spending decisions.
33737.zh_abstract: 家庭在应对收入支持计划时，时间和金钱的分配因不同的家庭环境和偏好而异，然而这种异质性反应尚未得到充分理解。利用一项基于美国的大规模、多地点随机对照研究的数据，我们检验了每月无条件现金转移对儿童金钱和时间投资的异质性效应。这项研究提供了一个新颖的机会，可以按种族和民族检验现金转移的异质性效应，其中现金的获得独立于基于其他人口特征的资格条件。尽管家庭结构、政府福利领取和就业状况存在初始差异，但现金转移对家庭净收入、收入和家庭支出的影响在不同种族或民族的家庭中相似。然而，对儿童金钱和时间投资的影响却有所不同。拉丁裔家庭的儿童专项支出增加，相当于现金转移的近三分之一，但对母亲就业或与孩子相处的时间没有影响。在黑人家庭中，母亲的工作时间减少，与孩子一起进行早期学习活动的时间增加，但对儿童专项支出没有影响。来自不同收入来源的儿童特定商品的边际消费倾向也有所不同：估计显示，在拉丁裔家庭中，来自政府收入的儿童特定商品边际消费倾向高于来自母亲收入的，而在黑人家庭中则相反。拉丁裔家庭对无条件现金转移和政府收入的反应，与收入预期用途信号影响支出决策的观点一致。
33737.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：H31, I18, I30, I31, I38, J13, J15, J18, J22

33736.title: Do Transfer Pricing Reforms Lead to a Boom in Tax Consultants?
33736.zh_title: 转让定价改革会导致税务顾问激增吗？
33736.authors: Dina Pomeranz, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
33736.abstract: The OECD has promoted the adoption of internationally standardized transfer pricing rules to curb profit shifting for tax avoidance by multinational firms. Bustos et al. (2023) analyzed a large reform in Chile based on these OECD standards and found that it led to a surge in tax advisory services. This paper investigates the external validity of this finding. Combining employment history data with information on countries’ strictness of transfer pricing regulations over time, we analyze the effect for four countries: Chile, Colombia, Spain, and Uruguay. Event-study difference-in-differences analysis shows that reforms led to substantial increase in transfer pricing consultants in most cases. The effect is larger when the reform is stronger and when a country has a lower level of pre-treatment transfer pricing strictness or of transfer pricing consultants.
33736.zh_abstract: 经合组织（OECD）推动采用国际标准化的转让定价规则，以遏制跨国企业通过利润转移进行避税。Bustos等人（2023）分析了智利基于这些OECD标准进行的一项重大改革，发现该改革导致了税务咨询服务的激增。本文研究了这一发现的外部有效性。通过将就业历史数据与各国转让定价监管严格程度随时间变化的信息相结合，我们分析了四个国家（智利、哥伦比亚、西班牙和乌拉圭）的效应。事件研究双重差分分析表明，在大多数情况下，改革导致转让定价顾问数量大幅增加。当改革力度更强，且一个国家在改革前的转让定价严格程度或转让定价顾问数量较低时，这种效应更大。

33735.title: Innovation and Health Inequality: Evidence from Direct-Acting Antivirals
33735.zh_title: 创新与健康不平等：来自直接抗病毒药物的证据
33735.authors: Kevin Callison, Michael E. Darden, Keith F. Teltser
33735.abstract: We study disparities in liver transplant allocation when innovation alleviates the scarcity of organs. When direct-acting antivirals for Hepatitis C (HCV) reduced HCV+ liver demand, we show a disproportionate increase in White HCV- liver transplants (56.6%) relative to Black HCV- transplants (11.9%). The time to transplant decreased (31.1%), and the transplant rate increased (19.5pp), only for White HCV- patients. Our results are surprising because liver health is the primary determinant of transplant priority and marginal White patients were of better liver health. We show more similar gains when we focus on privately insured patients and/or areas with more Black patients.
33735.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当创新缓解器官稀缺时，肝脏移植分配中的差异。当针对丙型肝炎（HCV）的直接抗病毒药物减少了对HCV+肝脏的需求时，我们发现白人HCV-肝脏移植数量（56.6%）相对于黑人HCV-肝脏移植数量（11.9%）出现了不成比例的增长。只有白人HCV-患者的移植等待时间缩短（31.1%），移植率提高（19.5个百分点）。我们的结果令人惊讶，因为肝脏健康是移植优先权的主要决定因素，而边缘白人患者的肝脏健康状况更好。当我们关注拥有私人保险的患者和/或黑人患者较多的地区时，我们发现了更相似的收益。

33734.title: A Stepping Stone Approach to Norm Transitions
33734.zh_title: 规范转型的垫脚石方法
33734.authors: Selim Gulesci, Sam Jindani, Eliana La Ferrara, David Smerdon, Munshi Sulaiman, H. Peyton Young
33734.abstract: We propose a model to study when an intermediate action can serve as a “stepping stone” that enables the elimination of a harmful norm. While the intermediate action may facilitate the first “step”, it may also become a new norm. We derive intuitive conditions for stepping stones, which depend on the relative size of social penalties and intrinsic utility benefits. We propose an econometric approach to testing whether an intermediate action is a stepping stone, and apply it to original data on female genital cutting in Somalia. The analysis shows that the intermediate action may become the new norm.
33734.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，用于研究中间行动何时可以作为“垫脚石”，从而促成有害规范的消除。虽然中间行动可能促进第一步“迈出”，但它也可能成为一种新规范。我们推导出垫脚石的直观条件，这些条件取决于社会惩罚与内在效用收益的相对大小。我们提出了一种计量经济学方法来检验中间行动是否为垫脚石，并将其应用于索马里女性割礼的原始数据。分析表明，中间行动可能成为新规范。

33733.title: Trends in Work Capacity in the US Population: Are Recent Cohorts in Worse Health?
33733.zh_title: 美国人口工作能力趋势：近期队列的健康状况更差吗？
33733.authors: David M. Cutler, Ellen Meara, Susan Stewart
33733.abstract: The growth of longevity in the U.S. and other countries has increased interest in raising the age of eligibility for public retirement benefits. The consequences of this policy depend on the health of the older adult population overall and by socioeconomic group. In this paper, we estimate how multiple dimensions of non-fatal health in older adults evolve over time and across cohorts – physical functioning, mental health, pain, and cognition. Our sample is individuals in the Health and Retirement Study who are aged 51 to 54 at baseline and are followed for up to two decades. We find that limitations in most domains have increased for younger cohorts, especially pain and cognitive impairment. People are more impaired in their 50s, where such impairment used to occur in one’s 60s. However, this appears to be a speeding up of impairment more than a long-term increase. Among people in their late 60s, health for later cohorts is similar to health for earlier cohorts. To evaluate the implications of these trends, we simulate the work capacity of adults just before reaching age 65 based on the health status of people at this age and the relationship between health and the labor force outcomes of younger people. Overall health among those age 62 to 64 remains high, despite impairment striking at younger ages. However, among people without high school degrees, less than half are predicted to have the capacity to work full time by age 62 to 64, and over a quarter are predicted to be receiving SSDI.
33733.zh_abstract: 美国及其他国家预期寿命的增长，提高了人们对提高公共退休福利领取年龄的兴趣。这一政策的后果取决于老年人口的整体健康状况以及不同社会经济群体的健康状况。在本文中，我们估算了老年人非致命性健康的多个维度——身体功能、心理健康、疼痛和认知——如何随时间及队列演变。我们的样本是健康与退休研究中基线年龄为51至54岁、并接受长达二十年追踪的个体。我们发现，较年轻队列在大多数领域的限制有所增加，尤其是疼痛和认知障碍。人们在50多岁时就出现更多损伤，而这种损伤过去通常发生在60多岁。然而，这似乎是损伤的加速出现，而非长期增加。在接近70岁的人群中，较晚队列的健康状况与较早队列相似。为了评估这些趋势的影响，我们根据该年龄人群的健康状况以及健康与年轻人劳动力市场结果之间的关系，模拟了刚满65岁成年人的工作能力。尽管损伤在更年轻时出现，但62至64岁人群的整体健康状况仍然良好。然而，在没有高中学历的人群中，预计不到一半的人在62至64岁时有能力全职工作，超过四分之一的人预计正在领取社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）。

33732.title: Analyzing the Effects of Occupational Licensing on Earnings Inequality in the United States
33732.zh_title: 分析职业许可对美国收入不平等的影响
33732.authors: Kihwan Bae, Morris M. Kleiner, Conor Norris, Edward J. Timmons
33732.abstract: There is a consensus that there is an earnings premium for licensed workers relative to unlicensed workers. However, little is known about how occupational licensing affects earnings inequality. In this paper, we study dynamic, heterogeneous earnings effects of occupational licensing and draw implications for earnings inequality in the United States. First, we find that the earnings gap between workers in licensed occupations and those in unlicensed occupations with similar characteristics (“licensing premium”) increased slightly during the 1983–2019 period. Second, we find that the licensing premium for workers in high paying occupations significantly increased, which is not the case for workers in lower paying occupations. The finding is consistent with growing demands for skills over the past decades, given the more rigorous licensing requirements for high-skilled occupations. As a result, earnings inequality among workers in licensed occupations increased. Third, we document that the licensing premium for female workers and workers without a college education declined relative to male workers and college graduates. Taken together, our findings suggest that occupational licensing is associated with widening earnings inequality in the United States during the 1983–2019 period.
33732.zh_abstract: 学界普遍认为，持证工人相对于无证工人存在收入溢价。然而，关于职业许可如何影响收入不平等，我们知之甚少。本文研究了职业许可的动态、异质性收入效应，并探讨其对美国收入不平等的启示。首先，我们发现，在1983年至2019年期间，持证职业工人与特征相似的无证职业工人之间的收入差距（即“许可溢价”）略有扩大。其次，我们发现，高薪职业工人的许可溢价显著增加，而低薪职业工人则并非如此。这一发现与过去几十年来技能需求不断增长的趋势一致，因为高技能职业的许可要求更为严格。其结果是，持证职业工人内部的收入不平等加剧。第三，我们记录到，与男性和大学毕业生相比，女性工人和未受过大学教育的工人的许可溢价有所下降。综合来看，我们的研究结果表明，在1983年至2019年期间，职业许可与美国收入不平等的扩大有关。

33731.title: The Demographic and Research Styles of Economics Writing
33731.zh_title: 经济学写作的人口统计特征与研究风格
33731.abstract: This study examines publications in three leading general economics journals from the 1960s through the 2020s, considering levels and trends in the demographics of authors, methodologies of the studies, and patterns of co-authorship. The average age of authors has increased nearly steadily; there has been a sharp increase in the fraction of female authors; the number of authors per paper has risen steadily; and there has been a pronounced shift to articles using newly generated data. All but the first of these trends have been most pronounced in the most recent decade. The study also examines the relationships among these trends.
33731.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了从1960年代到2020年代，三本顶级综合经济学期刊上的出版物，分析了作者人口统计特征、研究方法以及合著模式的变化趋势。作者的平均年龄几乎持续上升；女性作者的比例急剧增加；每篇论文的作者数量稳步增长；并且出现了向使用新生成数据的文章的显著转变。除第一个趋势外，所有这些趋势在最近十年最为明显。本研究还探讨了这些趋势之间的相互关系。

33730.title: The Gender Gap in Career Trajectories: Do Firms Matter?
33730.zh_title: 职业发展轨迹中的性别差距：企业重要吗？
33730.authors: David Card, Francesco Devicienti, Mariacristina Rossi, Andrea Weber
33730.abstract: The gender wage gap rises with experience. To what extent do firm policies mediate this rise? We use administrative data from Italy to identify workers' first jobs and compute wage growth over the next 5 years. We then decompose the contribution of first employers to the rise in the gender wage gap, taking account of maternity events affecting a third of female entrants. We find that idiosyncratic firm effects explain 20% of the variation in early career wage growth, and that the sorting of women to slower-growth firms accounts for a fifth of the gender growth gap. Women who have a child within 5 years of entering work have particularly slow wage growth, reflecting a maternity effect that is magnified by the excess sorting of mothers-to-be to slower-growth firms. Many entrants change jobs within their first 5 years, and we find that the male-female difference in early career wage growth arises from gaps for both movers and stayers. The first employer components in wage growth for stayers and movers are highly correlated, and contribute similar sorting penalties for women who stay or leave.
33730.zh_abstract: 性别工资差距随工作经验增加而扩大。企业政策在多大程度上调节了这一扩大过程？我们利用意大利的行政数据，识别工人的第一份工作，并计算其后5年的工资增长。然后，我们分解第一雇主对性别工资差距扩大的贡献，同时考虑了影响三分之一女性新进入者的生育事件。我们发现，企业特定效应解释了早期职业工资增长变异的20%，而女性流向增长较慢企业的分类效应解释了性别增长差距的五分之一。在入职5年内生育孩子的女性，其工资增长尤其缓慢，这反映了生育效应，而准母亲过度流向增长较慢的企业则放大了这一效应。许多新进入者在入职头5年内更换了工作，我们发现，早期职业工资增长中的男女差异源于流动者和留守者两方面的差距。流动者和留守者工资增长中的第一雇主成分高度相关，并且对选择留下或离开的女性都造成了相似的分类惩罚。

33729.title: The Sources of Researcher Variation in Economics
33729.zh_title: 经济学中研究者差异的来源
33729.authors: Nick Huntington-Klein, Claus C. Portner, Ian McCarthy, The Many Economists Collaborative on Researcher Variation
33729.abstract: We use a rigorous three-stage many-analysts design to assess how different researcher decisions—specifically data cleaning, research design, and the interpretation of a policy question—affect the variation in estimated treatment effects. A total of 146 research teams each completed the same causal inference task three times each: first with few constraints, then using a shared research design, and finally with pre-cleaned data in addition to a specified design. We find that even when analyzing the same data, teams reach different conclusions. In the first stage, the interquartile range (IQR) of the reported policy effect was 3.1 percentage points, with substantial outliers. Surprisingly, the second stage, which restricted research design choices, exhibited slightly higher IQR (4.0 percentage points), largely attributable to imperfect adherence to the prescribed protocol. By contrast, the final stage, featuring standardized data cleaning, narrowed variation in estimated effects, achieving an IQR of 2.4 percentage points. Reported sample sizes also displayed significant convergence under more restrictive conditions, with the IQR dropping from 295,187 in the first stage to 29,144 in the second, and effectively zero by the third. Our findings underscore the critical importance of data cleaning in shaping applied microeconomic results and highlight avenues for future replication efforts.
33729.zh_abstract: 我们采用严格的三阶段多分析师设计，评估不同的研究者决策——具体包括数据清理、研究设计以及对政策问题的解读——如何影响估计处理效应的变异。共有146个研究团队各自完成了三次相同的因果推断任务：第一次几乎没有约束，第二次使用共享的研究设计，第三次在指定设计的基础上使用预清理数据。我们发现，即使分析相同的数据，不同团队也会得出不同的结论。在第一阶段，报告的政策效应的四分位距（IQR）为3.1个百分点，并存在大量异常值。令人惊讶的是，限制研究设计选择的第二阶段，其IQR略高（4.0个百分点），这主要归因于对规定方案的不完全遵守。相比之下，以标准化数据清理为特征的最终阶段，缩小了估计效应的变异，IQR降至2.4个百分点。报告样本量在更具限制性的条件下也表现出显著的收敛性，IQR从第一阶段的295,187下降到第二阶段的29,144，到第三阶段几乎为零。我们的发现强调了数据清理在塑造应用微观经济学结果中的关键重要性，并为未来的复制工作指明了方向。

33719.title: Saved by Medicaid: New Evidence on Health Insurance and Mortality from the Universe of Low-Income Adults
33719.zh_title: 被医疗补助拯救：来自全美低收入成年人关于健康保险与死亡率的新证据
33719.abstract: We examine the causal effect of health insurance on mortality using the universe of low-income adults, a dataset of 37 million individuals identified by linking the 2010 Census to administrative tax data. Our methodology leverages state-level variation in the timing and adoption of Medicaid expansions under the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and earlier waivers and adheres to a preregistered analysis plan, a rarely used approach in observational studies in economics. We find that expansions increased Medicaid enrollment by 12 percentage points and reduced the mortality of the low-income adult population by 2.5 percent, suggesting a 21 percent reduction in the mortality hazard of new enrollees. Mortality reductions accrued not only to older age cohorts, but also to younger adults, who accounted for nearly half of life-years saved due to their longer remaining lifespans and large share of the low-income adult population. These expansions appear to be cost-effective, with direct budgetary costs of $\$5.4$ million per life saved and $\$179,000$ per life-year saved falling well below valuations commonly found in the literature. Our findings suggest that lack of health insurance explains about five to twenty percent of the mortality disparity between high- and low-income Americans. We contribute to a growing body of evidence that health insurance improves health and demonstrate that Medicaid’s life-saving effects extend across a broader swath of the low-income population than previously understood.
33719.zh_abstract: 我们利用全美低收入成年人这一包含3700万个体的数据集（通过将2010年人口普查与行政税收数据关联识别），考察了健康保险对死亡率的因果效应。我们的方法利用了各州在《平价医疗法案》（ACA）及早期豁免下实施医疗补助扩展的时间和采纳上的差异，并遵循了预先注册的分析计划——这在经济学观察性研究中是一种罕见的方法。我们发现，医疗补助扩展使参保率提高了12个百分点，并将低收入成年人口的死亡率降低了2.5%，这表明新参保者的死亡风险降低了21%。死亡率的降低不仅体现在老年群体中，也体现在年轻成年人中，由于他们剩余寿命更长且在低收入成年人口中占比很大，他们贡献了几乎一半的挽救生命年。这些扩展似乎具有成本效益，每条挽救生命的直接预算成本为540万美元，每个挽救生命年的成本为17.9万美元，远低于文献中常见的估值。我们的发现表明，缺乏健康保险解释了高收入与低收入美国人之间死亡率差距的约5%至20%。我们为越来越多的健康保险能改善健康的证据做出了贡献，并证明医疗补助的救生效应覆盖了比先前认知更广泛的低收入人群。

33795.title: Shifting Work Patterns with Generative AI
33795.zh_title: 生成式人工智能带来的工作模式转变
33795.authors: Eleanor W. Dillon, Sonia Jaffe, Nicole Immorlica, Christopher T. Stanton
33795.abstract: We present evidence from a field experiment across 66 firms and 7,137 knowledge workers. Workers were randomly selected to access a generative AI tool integrated into applications they already used at work for email, meetings, and writing. In the second half of the 6-month experiment, the 80% of treated workers who used this tool spent two fewer hours on email each week and reduced their time working outside of regular hours. Apart from these individual time savings, we do not detect shifts in the quantity or composition of workers’ tasks resulting from individual-level AI provision.
33795.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项涵盖66家企业和7137名知识工作者的现场实验证据。工作者被随机分配使用一种生成式人工智能工具，该工具集成在他们工作中已使用的电子邮件、会议和写作应用程序中。在为期6个月的实验后半段，使用该工具的80%的受处理工作者每周在电子邮件上花费的时间减少了两个小时，并减少了在常规工作时间之外的工作时间。除了这些个人时间节省之外，我们没有检测到因个体层面的人工智能提供而导致的工作任务数量或构成的变化。
33795.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：L23, M1, M15, M5, O33

33794.title: Revisiting the Forecasts of Others
33794.abstract: In macroeconomic models with dispersed information, agents have an incentive to learn from endogenous variables, which themselves depend on the forecasts of others. This paper revisits the model of Townsend (1983) to characterize how this mechanism affects equilibrium dynamics. The first part of the paper simplifies, revises, and extends past results about situations when prices are fully revealing. The second part shows that full revelation does not occur in the original model and proves that the equilibrium state vector is infinite-dimensional. It also provides a new numerical solution procedure for such cases, which operates entirely in the frequency domain.
33794.zh_abstract: 在信息分散的宏观经济模型中，经济主体有动机从内生变量中学习，而这些内生变量本身又依赖于他人的预测。本文重新审视Townsend（1983）的模型，以刻画这一机制如何影响均衡动态。论文的第一部分简化、修正并扩展了关于价格何时完全揭示的过往结果。第二部分表明，在原始模型中完全揭示并未发生，并证明了均衡状态向量是无限维的。它还为此类情况提供了一种新的数值求解程序，该程序完全在频域中运行。

33793.title: Migration and Regime Change: Outflows Follow Democratic Decline, Inflows Fuel Illiberal Drift
33793.zh_title: 移民与政权更迭：外流伴随民主衰退，流入助长非自由化倾向
33793.abstract: This paper explores the two-way relationship between international migration and political regime change, emphasizing the potential for a feedback loop: political shifts influence migration patterns, and migration can, in turn, affect political developments. Using a Difference-in-Differences (DiD) approach and a dataset combining migration flows, regime quality indicators (CHRI), and measures of economic integration such as EU membership, the study identifies three key findings. First, substantial immigration into politically fragile democracies can further weaken their institutions. Second, democratic decline tends to increase emigration, undermining a country's ability to a democratic institutional recovery. Third, international economic integration, particularly in our study, through EU accession—shapes how emigration responds to political change.
33793.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了国际移民与政治政权更迭之间的双向关系，强调了反馈循环的可能性：政治变化影响移民模式，而移民反过来又可能影响政治发展。采用双重差分方法，并结合移民流动、政权质量指标（CHRI）以及欧盟成员国身份等经济一体化衡量标准的数据集，研究确定了三个关键发现。首先，大量移民进入政治脆弱的民主国家可能进一步削弱其制度。其次，民主衰退往往会增加移民外流，削弱国家实现民主制度复苏的能力。第三，国际经济一体化——在我们的研究中，特别是通过加入欧盟——塑造了移民外流对政治变化的反应方式。

33792.title: The 2025 Trade War: Dynamic Impacts Across U.S. States and the Global Economy
33792.zh_title: 2025年贸易战：对美国各州和全球经济的动态影响
33792.authors: Andrés Rodríguez-Clare, Mauricio Ulate, Jose P. Vasquez
33792.abstract: We use a dynamic trade and reallocation model with downward nominal wage rigidities to quantitatively assess the economic consequences of recent U.S. tariff increases on imports from Mexico, Canada, and China, as well as the “reciprocal” tariff changes announced on “Liberation Day” and retaliatory measures by other countries. Higher tariffs lead to a rise in U.S. manufacturing employment, but this comes at the cost of declines in service and agricultural jobs. Overall employment falls, as lower real wages reduce labor-force participation. Real income in the U.S. declines by about 1% by 2028, the final year we assume the tariffs remain in effect. A key feature of our analysis is the disaggregation of the U.S. into its 50 states, incorporating cross-state redistribution of tariff revenue. This allows us to identify which states gain or lose more from the policy shock. Around half of the states experience real income losses, with some seeing declines greater than 3%. At the international level, close U.S. trading partners—including Canada, Mexico, China, and Ireland—suffer the largest real income losses.
33792.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个包含名义工资向下刚性的动态贸易与再分配模型，定量评估近期美国对来自墨西哥、加拿大和中国的进口商品加征关税，以及在“解放日”宣布的“对等”关税变化和其他国家报复性措施的经济后果。更高的关税导致美国制造业就业增加，但这以服务业和农业岗位的减少为代价。总体就业下降，因为实际工资降低减少了劳动力参与。到2028年（我们假设关税持续生效的最后一年），美国实际收入下降约1%。我们分析的一个关键特征是将美国分解为50个州，并纳入关税收入的跨州再分配。这使我们能够识别哪些州从政策冲击中获益或损失更多。大约一半的州经历了实际收入损失，其中一些州的降幅超过3%。在国际层面，美国密切的贸易伙伴——包括加拿大、墨西哥、中国和爱尔兰——遭受了最大的实际收入损失。

33791.title: Separation of Church and State Curricula? Public Standards, Private Values, and Textbook Content
33791.zh_title: 政教课程分离？审视公立与宗教私立学校教科书
33791.abstract: Curricula impart knowledge, instill values, and shape collective memory. Despite growing public funding for religious schools through U.S. school choice programs, little is known about what they teach. We examine textbooks from public schools, religious private schools, and home schools, applying computational methods—including AI tools—to measure the presence and portrayal of people, topics, and values over time. Despite narratives of political polarization, our findings reveal few meaningful differences between public school textbooks from Texas and California. However, religious school textbooks have less female representation, feature lighter-skinned individuals, and portray topics like evolution and religion differently. Over one-third of pages in each collection convey character values, with a higher proportion in religious school textbooks. Important similarities also emerge: all textbook collections rarely include LGBTQIA+ discussion, portray females in more positive but less active or powerful contexts than males, and depict the U.S. founding era and slavery in similar contexts.
33791.zh_abstract: 课程传授知识、灌输价值观并塑造集体记忆。尽管通过美国择校项目，宗教学校的公共资金不断增加，但人们对它们教授的内容知之甚少。我们考察了来自公立学校、宗教私立学校和家庭学校的教科书，应用计算方法（包括人工智能工具）来测量人物、主题和价值观随时间的存在与描绘方式。尽管存在政治极化的叙事，我们的发现显示德克萨斯州和加利福尼亚州的公立学校教科书之间几乎没有有意义的差异。然而，宗教学校教科书中的女性代表性较少，描绘的人物肤色较浅，并且对进化论和宗教等主题的呈现方式不同。每个集合中超过三分之一的页面传达了品格价值观，宗教学校教科书中的比例更高。重要的相似之处也浮现出来：所有教科书集合都很少包含LGBTQIA+讨论，将女性描绘得比男性更积极但更不活跃或更不强大，并且对美国建国时代和奴隶制的描绘背景相似。

33790.title: Litigation Risk and the Valuation of Legal Claims: A Real Option Approach
33790.zh_title: 诉讼风险与法律索赔估值：一种实物期权方法
33790.authors: Jose Portela, Eduardo S. Schwartz, Jaime Aparicio Garcia
33790.abstract: Legal claims are increasingly being considered as an alternative asset class, however, there appears to be a lack of a standard methodology for valuing litigation risk. This paper proposes a dynamic real options framework for the valuation of legal claims, explicitly incorporating the uncertainty and sequential nature of litigation processes. We develop a continuous-time stochastic model that accounts for the main procedural milestones and uncertainties, enabling the simulation of diverse litigation trajectories to estimate the net present value of a claim. The model permits the decision-maker to optimally continue or abandon the litigation at various stages, thereby capturing the embedded option value and enhancing claim valuation. This approach offers a novel risk management and valuation tool for a range of stakeholders, including investors, third-party funders, claimants, defendants, legal practitioners, auditors, and insurers. We demonstrate the practical relevance of the methodology by applying it to an actual international investment arbitration case.
33790.zh_abstract: 法律索赔正越来越多地被视作一种另类资产类别，然而，似乎缺乏评估诉讼风险的标准方法。本文提出了一个用于法律索赔估值的动态实物期权框架，明确纳入了诉讼过程的不确定性和序列性。我们开发了一个连续时间随机模型，该模型考虑了主要的程序性里程碑和不确定性，能够模拟多样化的诉讼轨迹以估计索赔的净现值。该模型允许决策者在不同阶段最优地选择继续或放弃诉讼，从而捕捉嵌入的期权价值并增强索赔估值。这种方法为包括投资者、第三方资助者、索赔人、被告、法律从业者、审计师和保险公司在内的各类利益相关者提供了一种新颖的风险管理和估值工具。我们通过将该方法应用于一个实际的国际投资仲裁案例来证明其实践相关性。

33789.title: Renewable Asset Price Volatility and Its Implications for Decarbonization
33789.zh_title: 可再生资产价格波动性及其对脱碳的影响
33789.authors: Harrison Hong, Jeffrey D. Kubik, Edward P. Shore
33789.abstract: We find that the price volatility of renewable assets is significantly greater than that of brown assets. Our causal estimates leverage the response of electricity and credit markets to US state-level renewable portfolio standards that require some utilities to use renewables while exempting others. This extra risk is related to more volatile electricity prices and revenues, consistent with uncertainties including renewables intermittency. Using a growth model where the share of green capital balances climate damages and diversification benefits, we find that greater green-asset volatility is a more important determinant of economy-wide decarbonization than productivity differences of green versus brown capital.
33789.zh_abstract: 我们发现可再生资产的价格波动性显著高于棕色资产。我们的因果估计利用了电力市场和信贷市场对美国各州可再生组合标准的反应，该标准要求部分公用事业公司使用可再生能源，同时豁免其他公司。这种额外风险与更不稳定的电价和收入相关，与包括可再生能源间歇性在内的不确定性一致。使用一个绿色资本份额平衡气候损害与多元化收益的增长模型，我们发现，与绿色资本相对于棕色资本的生产率差异相比，更大的绿色资产波动性是决定整个经济脱碳的更重要的因素。
33789.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EFG, IO；JEL：G10, G11, Q20, Q4, Q54, Q56

33787.title: Job Amenity Shocks and Labor Reallocation
33787.zh_title: 工作便利性冲击与劳动力重新配置
33787.authors: Sadhika Bagga, Lukas Friedrich Mann, Ayşegül Şahin, Giovanni L. Violante
33787.abstract: We introduce aggregate shocks to workers' value of job amenities in a frictional equilibrium model of the labor market with on-the-job search, where the job creation cost is sunk and quits trigger vacancies. We examine how key labor market indicators respond to this shock: when the valuation of the amenity is heterogeneous in the population, labor reallocation ensues. A calibrated version of the model can quantitatively account for many distinct traits of the post-pandemic labor market recovery through three aggregate shocks: a temporary fall in productivity to account for the short, but sharp, downturn; a decline in the willingness to work; and, crucially, a persistent increase in workers' evaluation of job amenities. Cross-sectoral patterns of vacancies, quit rates, job-filling rates, and wages—where sectors are ranked by their share of teleworkable jobs—provide support to the view that the key amenity in question is the ability to work remotely.
33787.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含在职搜索的摩擦性均衡劳动力市场模型中引入了工人对工作便利性价值的总体冲击，其中工作创造成本是沉没的，辞职会触发职位空缺。我们考察了关键劳动力市场指标如何应对这一冲击：当人群中对便利性的估值存在异质性时，劳动力重新配置就会发生。该模型的校准版本可以通过三个总体冲击定量解释疫情后劳动力市场复苏的许多独特特征：生产力暂时下降以解释短暂但急剧的衰退；工作意愿下降；以及关键的是，工人对工作便利性评估的持续上升。跨部门的职位空缺率、辞职率、职位填补率和工资模式（按可远程工作职位份额对部门进行排序）支持了这样一种观点，即所讨论的关键便利性是远程工作的能力。

33786.title: Culture and Contemporary Political Preferences
33786.abstract: This chapter reviews the literature on the relationship between culture and political preferences. We distinguish conceptually between the direct cultural transmission of political ideology and the transmission of more primitive preferences and beliefs that influence preferences over policies, parties, and forms of government. While there is substantial evidence that political preferences persist across generations and within communities, the literature often does not specify which primitive values and beliefs drive this persistence. A growing body of work points to a multifaceted mapping from underlying preferences and beliefs over the material world and social relations to political ideology. In this chapter, we summarize these studies, organize their findings in a coherent framework, and suggest possible directions for future research.
33786.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了关于文化与政治偏好之间关系的文献。我们在概念上区分了政治意识形态的直接文化传播，以及影响对政策、政党和政府形式偏好的更原始偏好和信念的传播。虽然有大量证据表明政治偏好会在代际和社区内持续存在，但文献通常没有具体说明是哪些原始价值观和信念驱动了这种持续性。越来越多的研究指出，从对物质世界和社会关系的潜在偏好和信念到政治意识形态之间存在多方面的映射关系。在本章中，我们总结了这些研究，将其发现组织在一个连贯的框架内，并为未来研究提出了可能的方向。

33785.title: Who Benefits from Place-Based Policies? Evidence from Matched Employer-Employee Data
33785.zh_title: 谁从地方导向政策中受益？来自匹配雇主-雇员数据的证据
33785.authors: Philipp Grunau, Florian Hoffmann, Thomas Lemieux, Mirko Titze
33785.abstract: We study the granular wage and employment effects of a German place-based policy using a research design that leverages EU-wide rules governing program parameters at the regional level. The program subsidizes investments to create jobs with a subsidy rate that varies across labor market regions. We use matched data on the universe of establishments and their employees, establishment-level panel data on program participation, and regional scores that generate spatial discontinuities in program eligibility and generosity. Spatial spillovers of the program linked to changing commuting patterns can be assessed using information on place of work and place of residence, a unique feature of the data. We find that the program helps establishments create jobs that disproportionately benefit younger and less-educated workers. Funded establishments increase their wages, but, unlike employment, wage gains do not persist in the long run. Employment effects estimated at the local level are slightly larger than establishment-level estimates, suggesting limited economic spillover effect. Spatial spillovers are large as over half of the employment increase comes from commuters. Using subsidy rates as an instrumental variable for actual subsidies indicates that it costs approximately EUR 25,000 to create a new job in the economically disadvantaged areas targeted by the program.
33785.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种研究设计来研究德国地方导向政策对工资和就业的微观影响，该设计利用了欧盟层面管理区域层面项目参数的规则。该计划以补贴率补贴投资以创造就业机会，补贴率因劳动力市场区域而异。我们使用了涵盖所有机构及其雇员的匹配数据、机构层面关于项目参与的的面板数据，以及产生项目资格和慷慨程度空间不连续性的区域评分。与通勤模式变化相关的项目空间溢出效应可以通过工作地点和居住地信息来评估，这是数据的一个独特特征。我们发现，该计划帮助机构创造了不成比例地惠及年轻和受教育程度较低工人的就业岗位。获得资助的机构提高了工资，但与就业不同，工资增长在长期内无法持续。在地方层面估计的就业效应略大于机构层面的估计，表明经济溢出效应有限。空间溢出效应很大，因为超过一半的就业增长来自通勤者。使用补贴率作为实际补贴的工具变量表明，在该计划针对的经济弱势地区，创造一个新工作岗位的成本约为25,000欧元。

33784.title: The Tariff Tax Cut: Tariffs as Revenue
33784.zh_title: 关税减税：作为收入的关税
33784.authors: George A. Alessandria, Jiaxiaomei Ding, Shafaat Y. Khan, Carter B. Mix
33784.abstract: We evaluate the aggregate effects of a change in tariffs on the US and world economies when tariff revenue is used to enact fiscal reform. Our model combines a standard international model of fiscal policy with taxes and a dynamic model of trade participation and tariffs that allows for uncertainty and transitions. We consider effects of permanent and temporary tariffs–with and without retaliation–when tariff revenue is used to reduce taxes on capital or labor or to subsidize investment. Compared to a lump sum redistribution, using tariff revenue for these reforms always boosts economic activity. Key to our analysis is the effect of trade dynamics on import substitution, such that tariff revenue after an increase in tariffs is higher in the short run than in the long run. When increasing the tariff by 20 percentage points, the revenue raised is largest when tariffs are temporary, unilateral, and used to subsidize investment, increasing by about 2 percent of GDP. This case also yields a large temporary increase in the trade balance. We find the welfare-maximizing unilateral tariff is close to 18 percent when tariff revenue is used to subsidize investment compared to 0 percent under a lump sum redistribution. We also find cutting capital taxes does not generate as much growth as introducing an investment subsidy since tariffs raise the price of investment substantially.
33784.zh_abstract: 我们评估了当关税收入用于实施财政改革时，关税变化对美国及世界经济的总体影响。我们的模型将标准的国际财政政策模型（包含税收）与一个允许不确定性和转型的动态贸易参与和关税模型相结合。我们考虑了永久性和临时性关税（无论是否有报复）的影响，其中关税收入用于减少资本税或劳动税，或用于补贴投资。与一次性再分配相比，将这些关税收入用于这些改革总是会促进经济活动。我们分析的关键在于贸易动态对进口替代的影响，使得关税增加后的关税收入在短期内高于长期。当关税提高20个百分点时，在关税是临时性、单边且用于补贴投资的情况下，筹集的收入最大，约占GDP的2%。这种情况也导致贸易平衡出现暂时性大幅增加。我们发现，当关税收入用于补贴投资时，福利最大化的单边关税接近18%，而在一次性再分配下则为0%。我们还发现，削减资本税不会像引入投资补贴那样产生那么多增长，因为关税大幅提高了投资品价格。

33783.title: Acquiring Patents in Secret: Disclosure Timing in Markets for Technology
33783.zh_title: 秘密获取专利：技术市场中的披露时机
33783.authors: George Chondrakis, Carlos J. Serrano, Rosemarie Ziedonis
33783.abstract: Markets for technology provide a vibrant channel through which firms purchase ownership rights to patented inventions. Although such transactions enable firms to secure access to intangible assets originating beyond their borders, they also provide cues to competitors regarding the purchasing firm’s technological investments. This study explores the timing of strategic disclosure of patent acquisitions and the conditions under which firms trade the benefits of competitor deterrence through early recordation for those of secrecy through delayed disclosure. Using evidence on the lag between the execution and recording dates for US patents purchased by publicly traded corporations, we predict and find earlier disclosure of patent acquisitions when the buyer works on related technologies and is better positioned to enforce the patents (i.e., is large and relatively litigious). As predicted by the model, we also find that the buyer delays disclosure when the seller is a large firm, suggesting that buyers take advantage of the seller’s ability to deter competitors while keeping the transaction secret. Additional analyses reveal that (a) regulatory changes reducing the value of keeping acquisitions of patent applications secret lead to shorter recording lags, and (b) increases in the enforceability of business method and software patents further accelerate the voluntary recording of patent ownership changes. The study provides new evidence on the tradeoffs that innovating firms face when determining the timing of disclosure for patents they have purchased in technology markets.
33783.zh_abstract: 技术市场为企业购买专利发明的所有权提供了活跃的渠道。尽管此类交易使企业能够确保获得源自其边界之外的无形资产，但它们也向竞争对手提供了关于购买企业技术投资的线索。本研究探讨了专利收购战略披露的时机，以及企业在早期备案的竞争对手威慑收益与延迟披露的保密收益之间进行权衡的条件。利用美国上市公司购买专利的执行日期与记录日期之间的滞后期证据，我们预测并发现，当买方从事相关技术工作且更有能力执行专利（即规模大且相对好讼）时，专利收购的披露会更早。正如模型所预测的，我们还发现，当卖方是大公司时，买方会延迟披露，这表明买方利用卖方在保密交易的同时威慑竞争对手的能力。进一步的分析表明：（a）降低保密专利申请收购价值的监管变化会导致更短的记录滞后期；（b）商业方法和软件专利可执行性的提高进一步加速了专利所有权变更的自愿记录。该研究为创新企业在决定其在技术市场购买的专利披露时机时所面临的权衡提供了新证据。

33782.title: Mapping the Institutional Pipeline for Global AI Talent
33782.zh_title: 绘制全球人工智能人才的机构管道
33782.abstract: Immigrants, particularly those from Asian Low- and Middle-Income Countries (LMICs), play a central role in U.S. frontier AI firms, yet the pathways that bring them into these positions are not well understood. We examine how U.S. universities serve as institutional intermediaries linking global talent to domestic firms. Using data on 1,757 AI graduates from top U.S. PhD programs alongside surveys and interviews, we develop a three-stage process model tracing how immigrant students move into, through, and beyond doctoral programs. We find that, compared to native students, immigrant students are more likely to match with diaspora faculty at entry, that advisor industry ties are more strongly associated with immigrants’ participation in industry internships, and that internships are a common pathway through which immigrant graduates, particularly those from Asian LMICs, enter top AI firms. Our findings reframe skilled immigration into elite firms as a product of institutional intermediation, and reveal a pipeline whose functioning depends on specific relational structures that are vulnerable to disruption.
33782.zh_abstract: 移民，特别是来自亚洲中低收入国家的移民，在美国前沿人工智能公司中扮演着核心角色，然而将他们带入这些职位的途径尚不明确。我们研究了美国大学如何作为机构中介，将全球人才与国内公司联系起来。利用来自美国顶尖博士项目的1,757名人工智能毕业生的数据，以及调查和访谈，我们开发了一个三阶段过程模型，追踪移民学生如何进入、经历并走出博士项目。我们发现，与本土学生相比，移民学生更有可能在入学时与同族裔教师匹配；导师的行业关系与移民参与行业实习的关联性更强；实习是移民毕业生（特别是来自亚洲中低收入国家的毕业生）进入顶尖人工智能公司的常见途径。我们的发现将精英公司的技术移民重新定义为机构中介的产物，并揭示了一个其功能依赖于特定关系结构（这些结构易受干扰）的管道。
33782.meta: Programs：ED, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F22, I23, J24, O31

33781.title: Gene x Environment Interactions: Polygenic Scores and the Impact of an Early Childhood Intervention in Colombia
33781.zh_title: 基因×环境交互作用：多基因评分与哥伦比亚一项早期儿童干预的影响
33781.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Gabriella Conti, Pamela Jervis, Costas Meghir, Aysu Okbay
33781.abstract: We evaluate impacts heterogeneity of an Early Childhood Intervention, with respect to the Educational Attainment Polygenic Score (EA4 PGS) constructed from DNA data based on GWAS weights from a European population. We find that the EA4 PGS is predictive of several measures of child development, mother’s IQ and, to some extent, educational attainment. We also show that the impacts of the intervention are significantly greater in children with low PGS, to the point that the intervention eliminates the initial genetic disadvantage. Lastly, we find that children with high PGS attract more parental stimulation; however, the latter increases more strongly in children with low PGS.
33781.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一项早期儿童干预对教育成就多基因评分（EA4 PGS）的异质性影响，该评分基于来自欧洲人群的全基因组关联研究权重，利用DNA数据构建。我们发现，EA4 PGS可以预测儿童发展的多项指标、母亲智商，并在一定程度上预测教育成就。我们还表明，干预对低PGS儿童的影响显著更大，以至于干预消除了最初的遗传劣势。最后，我们发现，高PGS儿童会吸引更多的父母刺激；然而，后者在低PGS儿童中增加得更强烈。
33781.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：I24, I26, I3, I38, O15

33780.title: The Social Returns to Public R&D
33780.abstract: Recent empirical evidence by Fieldhouse and Mertens (2024) points to a strong causal link between federal nondefense R&D funding and private-sector productivity growth, and large implied social returns to public R&D investment. We show that these high social return estimates broadly align with existing evidence on the social returns to private or total R&D spending. If the R&D increases authorized under the CHIPS and Science Act were fully appropriated, our modeling indicates a boost in U.S. productivity within a few years, reaching gains of 0.2–0.4% after seven years or more. At their peak, the direct productivity effects of the implied expansion in nondefense R&D alone would raise output by over $\$40$ billion in a single year—exceeding total outlays from the CHIPS Act R&D provisions over a decade. The potential productivity impact of fiscal consolidations changing R&D spending is not clear ex ante. We show that in recent fiscal consolidations, cuts to federal R&D funding were largely borne by defense R&D, whereas funding for nondefense R&D was largely spared or was increased. Our evidence suggests that future deficit reduction efforts that instead emphasize cuts to nondefense R&D funding could have a larger adverse impact on productivity and economic growth than previous fiscal consolidations.
33780.zh_abstract: Fieldhouse和Mertens（2024）的最新实证证据表明，联邦非国防研发资金与私营部门生产率增长之间存在强烈的因果关系，并且公共研发投资隐含巨大的社会回报。我们证明，这些高社会回报估计与现有关于私人或总研发支出社会回报的证据大致一致。如果《芯片与科学法案》授权的研发增加得到充分拨款，我们的模型显示，美国生产率将在几年内得到提升，并在七年或更长时间后达到0.2%至0.4%的增长。在峰值时期，仅非国防研发扩张的直接生产率效应就将在单一年份内使产出增加超过400亿美元——这超过了《芯片法案》研发条款在十年内的总支出。改变研发支出的财政整顿对生产率的潜在影响事前并不明确。我们表明，在近期的财政整顿中，联邦研发资金的削减主要由国防研发承担，而非国防研发资金基本未受影响甚至有所增加。我们的证据表明，未来侧重于削减非国防研发资金的赤字削减努力，可能对生产率和经济增长产生比以往财政整顿更大的不利影响。

33779.title: Location Effects or Sorting? Evidence from Firm Relocation
33779.zh_title: 区位效应还是分类效应？来自企业搬迁的证据
33779.authors: Pauline Carry, Benny Kleinman, Elio Nimier-David
33779.abstract: Why are wages in New York or Paris higher than in other cities? This paper uses establishment mobility to separate the role of “location effects” (e.g., local geography, infrastructure, and agglomeration) from the spatial sorting of workers and firms. Using French administrative records and U.S. commercial data, we document that 4% of establishments relocate annually. Establishments retain their main activity and structure as they move, but adjust their workforce and wages. Combining establishment and worker mobility, we decompose wage disparities across French commuting zones. We find that spatial wage differences are largely driven by the sorting and co-location of workers and firms: location effects account for only 2–4% of disparities, while differences in the composition of workers and establishments account for 30% and 17%, respectively. The remaining half is accounted for by the co-location of high-wage workers and establishments, especially in cities with high location effects. Revisiting the elasticity of local wages to population density, we find a significant coefficient of 0.007—two to three times lower than estimates that do not control for establishment composition.
33779.zh_abstract: 为什么纽约或巴黎的工资高于其他城市？本文利用机构流动性来区分“区位效应”（例如，当地地理、基础设施和集聚效应）与工人和企业的空间分类的作用。利用法国行政记录和美国商业数据，我们记录了每年有4%的机构搬迁。机构在搬迁时保留其主要活动和结构，但会调整其劳动力和工资。结合机构与工人流动性，我们分解了法国通勤区之间的工资差异。我们发现，空间工资差异主要由工人和企业的分类与共址驱动：区位效应仅占差异的2%至4%，而工人和机构构成的差异分别占30%和17%。剩余的一半由高工资工人和机构的共址解释，尤其是在区位效应高的城市。重新审视地方工资对人口密度的弹性，我们发现一个显著的系数0.007——比未控制机构构成的估计值低两到三倍。
33779.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PE, PR；JEL：F0, J0, R0

33778.title: Risk Markups
33778.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Cedomir Malgieri, Christopher Tonetti
33778.abstract: We study optimal policy when heterogeneous markups reflect compensation for uninsurable persistent idiosyncratic risk. The optimal labor tax keep rate equals (1) the aggregate markup times (2) workers' consumption share divided by their Pareto weight. Markups correctly capture the private cost of risk that reduces labor demand, but they are socially inefficient. This requires a subsidy equal to the aggregate markup, as in the traditional market-power perspective. However, even with lump-sum transfers, risk markups lead entrepreneurs to dynamically overaccumulate wealth to self-insure, so impoverished workers oversupply labor. In the long run this effect dominates and it's optimal to tax labor.
33778.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当异质性加成反映了对不可保险的持续性异质性风险的补偿时的最优政策。最优劳动税率等于（1）总加成乘以（2）工人的消费份额除以其帕累托权重。加成正确地捕捉了降低劳动需求的私人风险成本，但它们在社交上是低效的。这要求一个等于总加成的补贴，正如传统的市场势力观点所认为的那样。然而，即使存在一次性转移支付，风险加成也会导致企业家为了自我保险而动态地过度积累财富，从而使贫困工人过度供给劳动。长期来看，这种效应占主导地位，对劳动征税是最优的。
33778.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, ME, PE, PR；JEL：D52, E21, E23, G11, H21, L26

33777.title: Still Waters, Rapid Currents: Early Labor Market Transformation under Generative AI
33777.zh_title: 静水深流：生成式人工智能下的早期劳动力市场转型
33777.abstract: We study the early labor market impacts of AI chatbots by linking large-scale adoption surveys to administrative labor market records in Denmark. We document rapid currents: most employers in exposed occupations have adopted chatbot initiatives, workers report productivity benefits, and new AI-related tasks are widespread. Yet these currents have not broken the surface: using difference-indifferences, we estimate precise null effects on earnings and recorded hours at both the worker and workplace levels, ruling out effects larger than 2% two years after the launch of ChatGPT. What moves is the structure of work: employers absorb AI through task reorganization—including new tasks in content generation, AI oversight, and AI integration—and adopters transition into higher-paying occupations where AI chatbots are more relevant, though still too few to move average earnings. Technological change reshapes work well before it surfaces in earnings or hours.
33777.zh_abstract: 我们通过将大规模采用调查与丹麦的行政劳动力市场记录联系起来，研究人工智能聊天机器人的早期劳动力市场影响。我们记录了快速流动：大多数处于暴露职业的雇主已采用聊天机器人计划，工人报告了生产力提升，新的AI相关任务广泛存在。然而，这些流动尚未打破表面：使用双重差分法，我们在工人和工作场所层面估计了收入和记录工时的精确零效应，排除了ChatGPT推出两年后效应大于2%的可能性。发生变化的是工作结构：雇主通过任务重组（包括内容生成、AI监督和AI集成等新任务）吸收AI，并且采用者转向与AI聊天机器人更相关的高薪职业，尽管数量仍然太少，不足以改变平均收入。技术变革在收入和工时数据显现之前就已重塑工作。

33776.title: Divorce, Family Arrangements, and Children's Adult Outcomes
33776.zh_title: 离婚、家庭安排与子女成年后结果
33776.authors: Andrew C. Johnston, Maggie R. Jones, Nolan G. Pope
33776.abstract: Nearly a third of American children experience parental divorce before adulthood. To understand its consequences, we use linked tax and Census records for over 5 million children to examine how divorce affects family arrangements and children's long-term outcomes. Following divorce, parents move apart, household income falls, parents work longer hours, families move more frequently, and households relocate to poorer neighborhoods with less economic opportunity. This bundle of changes in family circumstances suggests multiple channels through which divorce may affect children's development and outcomes. In the years following divorce, we observe sharp increases in teen births and child mortality. To examine long-run effects on children, we compare siblings with different lengths of exposure to the same divorce. We find that parental divorce reduces children's adult earnings and college residence while increasing incarceration, mortality, and teen births. Changes in household income, neighborhood quality, and parent proximity account for 25 to 60 percent of these divorce effects.
33776.zh_abstract: 近三分之一的美国儿童在成年之前经历过父母离婚。为了理解其后果，我们利用超过500万儿童的关联税收和人口普查记录，研究离婚如何影响家庭安排和子女的长期结果。离婚后，父母分居，家庭收入下降，父母工作时间延长，家庭搬迁更频繁，并且家庭迁往经济机会更少的贫困社区。这一系列家庭状况的变化表明，离婚可能通过多种渠道影响儿童的发展和结果。在离婚后的几年里，我们观察到青少年生育和儿童死亡率急剧上升。为了研究对儿童的长期影响，我们比较了暴露于同一离婚事件不同时长的兄弟姐妹。我们发现，父母离婚会降低子女的成年收入和大学入学率，同时增加监禁、死亡率和青少年生育。家庭收入、社区质量和父母亲近度的变化解释了这些离婚效应的25%至60%。
33776.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D1, I31, J12, J13, R23

33775.title: Who You Gonna Call? Gender Inequality in External Demands for Parental Involvement
33775.zh_title: 你找谁？父母参与的外部需求中的性别不平等
33775.authors: Kristy Buzard, Laura K. Gee, Olga B. Stoddard
33775.abstract: Gender imbalance in time spent on child rearing causes gender inequalities in labor market outcomes, human capital accumulation, and economic mobility. We conduct a large-scale field experiment with a near-universe of US schools to investigate a potential source of inequality: external demands for parental involvement. Schools receive an email from a fictitious two-parent household and are asked to call one of the parents back. Mothers are 1.4 times more likely than fathers to be contacted. We decompose this inequality and demonstrate that the gender gap in external demands is associated with various measures of gender norms. We also show that signaling a father’s availability substantially changes the gender pattern of callbacks. Our findings underscore a process through which agents outside the household contribute to within-household gender inequalities.
33775.zh_abstract: 育儿时间上的性别失衡导致劳动力市场结果、人力资本积累和经济流动性方面的性别不平等。我们对美国近乎全体的学校进行了一项大规模实地实验，以调查一个潜在的不平等来源：父母参与的外部需求。学校收到一封来自虚构双亲家庭的电子邮件，并被要求回电给其中一位家长。母亲被联系的可能性是父亲的1.4倍。我们分解了这种不平等，并证明外部需求中的性别差距与各种性别规范指标相关。我们还表明，表明父亲有空闲会显著改变回电的性别模式。我们的发现强调了家庭外部主体如何促成家庭内部性别不平等的过程。
33775.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：J01, J13, J16

33774.title: Entrepreneurial Spawning from Remote Work
33774.authors: Alan Kwan, Ben Matthies, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
33774.abstract: Using a novel firm-level remote work measure created from big data on Internet activity, we show that firms with higher remote work during the pandemic are more likely to see their employees becoming entrepreneurs. This effect holds both unconditionally and relative to other types of job turnovers. We establish causality using instrumental variables and a panel event study. The marginally created businesses are higher quality than the average new firm. The effect is not driven by employee selection, preference change, or forced turnover. Rather, remote work increases spawning by providing the time and downside protection needed for entrepreneurial experimentation.
33774.zh_abstract: 利用从互联网活动大数据创建的新型企业层面远程工作衡量指标，我们表明，疫情期间远程工作程度较高的企业，其员工更有可能成为创业者。这种效应在无条件情况下以及相对于其他类型的职位流动都成立。我们使用工具变量和面板事件研究法建立了因果关系。边际创造的企业质量高于平均新企业。这种效应并非由员工选择、偏好变化或被迫离职驱动。相反，远程工作通过提供创业实验所需的时间和下行保护来增加创业催生。
33774.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：E32, J22, J24, L26, M13

33773.title: The Decline of Bank Branching
33773.authors: Rajesh P. Narayanan, Dimuthu Ratnadiwakara, Philip Strahan
33773.abstract: We study U.S. bank branch openings and closings from 2001 to 2023. Both are more common in areas with low deposit franchise value, a consequence of greater interest-rate sensitivity among financially sophisticated households with higher digital banking adoption. The effects are strongest for large banks. Lending plays a minimal role. Incumbents retain branches where depositors are less sensitive to rates because they can extract deposit spreads; entrants avoid such markets because sticky customers are difficult to attract. The pandemic accelerated closures by increasing digital reliance. Our findings highlight deposit franchise value as the primary driver of modern branch restructuring.
33773.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2001年至2023年美国银行分支机构的开设和关闭情况。两者在存款特许权价值较低的地区更为常见，这是金融知识更丰富、数字银行采用率更高的家庭对利率敏感性增强的结果。这种效应对大型银行最为显著。贷款的作用微乎其微。现有银行在储户对利率不敏感的地区保留分支机构，因为它们可以提取存款利差；新进入者则避开此类市场，因为粘性客户难以吸引。疫情通过增加对数字技术的依赖加速了关闭。我们的发现强调了存款特许权价值是现代分支机构重组的主要驱动力。

33772.title: Tariffs as Cost-Push Shocks: Implications for Optimal Monetary Policy
33772.zh_title: 关税作为成本推动冲击：对最优货币政策的影响
33772.authors: Iván Werning, Guido Lorenzoni, Veronica Guerrieri
33772.abstract: We study the optimal monetary policy response to the imposition of tariffs in a model with imported intermediate inputs. In a simple open-economy framework, we show that a tariff maps exactly into a cost-push shock in the standard closed-economy New Keynesian model, shifting the Phillips curve upward. We then characterize optimal monetary policy, showing that it partially accommodates the shock to smooth the transition to a more distorted long-run equilibrium—at the cost of higher short-run inflation.
33772.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在包含进口中间投入品的模型中，征收关税时最优货币政策的应对。在一个简单的开放经济框架下，我们证明关税恰好映射为标准封闭经济新凯恩斯模型中的成本推动冲击，使菲利普斯曲线上移。随后，我们刻画了最优货币政策，表明该政策会部分地适应这一冲击，以平滑向更扭曲的长期均衡的过渡——代价是短期通胀上升。

33771.title: Making America Great Again? The Economic Impacts of Liberation Day Tariffs
33771.zh_title: 让美国再次伟大？解放日关税的经济影响
33771.authors: Anna Ignatenko, Ahmad Lashkaripour, Luca Macedoni, Ina Simonovska
33771.abstract: On April 2, 2025, President Trump declared “Liberation Day,” announcing broad tariffs to reduce trade deficits and revive U.S. industry. We analyze the long-term economic impacts of these tariffs through the lens of a trade model that features flexible tariff passthrough and endogenous trade deficits, calibrated to trade and income data from 194 countries. If trading partners do not retaliate, the tariffs could decrease the U.S. trade deficit and improve its terms of trade, yielding modest welfare gains when tariff revenues reduce the income tax burden for American workers. However, reciprocal retaliation results in net welfare losses for the U.S. economy. We derive the unilaterally optimal tariff within our model and show that the USTR tariffs, based on bilateral deficits, differ markedly from this theoretical benchmark. Our calibrated model implies a unilaterally optimal tariff for the U.S. of 19 percent, uniformly applied across all trading partners, and linked to the overall trade deficit rather than bilateral imbalances. Under optimal foreign retaliation to the USTR tariffs, the calibrated model predicts a decline in U.S. welfare by up to 3.8 percent when accounting for input-output linkages, and a contraction in global employment by 1.1 percent.
33771.zh_abstract: 2025年4月2日，特朗普总统宣布“解放日”，公布了旨在减少贸易逆差和重振美国工业的广泛关税。我们通过一个贸易模型分析了这些关税的长期经济影响，该模型具有灵活的关税传导和内生贸易逆差特征，并基于194个国家的贸易和收入数据进行了校准。如果贸易伙伴不进行报复，这些关税可能减少美国贸易逆差并改善其贸易条件，当关税收入减轻美国工人的所得税负担时，会带来适度的福利收益。然而，对等报复会导致美国经济净福利损失。我们在模型内推导了单边最优关税，并表明基于双边逆差的美国贸易代表办公室关税与此理论基准显著不同。我们的校准模型显示，美国单边最优关税为19%，统一适用于所有贸易伙伴，并与整体贸易逆差而非双边失衡挂钩。在对美国贸易代表办公室关税进行最优外国报复的情况下，校准模型预测，当考虑投入产出关联时，美国福利将下降高达3.8%，全球就业将收缩1.1%。

33770.title: Is ESG a Sideshow? ESG Perceptions, Investment, and Firms' Financing Decisions
33770.zh_title: ESG是噱头吗？ESG认知、投资与公司融资决策
33770.authors: Roman Kräussl, Joshua Rauh, Denitsa Stefanova
33770.abstract: We study the effects of market ESG perceptions, as proxied by ESG ratings, on public firms’ security issuance and asset accumulation decisions. Higher ESG scores are followed by capital structure adjustments, specifically increases in equity issuance and decreases in net debt issuance of similar magnitude. These are driven completely by the “E” component of ESG. There are no effects of ESG assessments on capital expenditures or non-cash asset accumulation, supporting the hypothesis that ESG perceptions are a sideshow for capital investment. To address the endogeneity of firms' decisions to raise equity, we consider industry-wide rating changes and decompose the ESG ratings into an industry- and a firm-specific component. The response to the industry component of equity and debt issuance is highly significant, indicating that our findings are not explained by firms' decisions. As many ratings products use restated or backfilled ratings, our results focus on a point-in-time (PIT) ratings panel that we develop. We document that if using a standard ratings product instead of PIT data, researchers might falsely infer that higher ESG ratings lead to asset accumulation, due in particular to the use of restated ESG scores in standard ratings data products.
33770.zh_abstract: 我们研究了市场ESG认知（以ESG评级为代理变量）对上市公司证券发行和资产积累决策的影响。较高的ESG评分之后会出现资本结构调整，具体表现为股权发行增加和净债务发行减少，且幅度相似。这些影响完全由ESG中的“E”成分驱动。ESG评估对资本支出或非现金资产积累没有影响，支持了ESG认知对资本投资而言是噱头的假设。为了解决企业增发股权决策的内生性问题，我们考虑了行业层面的评级变化，并将ESG评级分解为行业特定和公司特定两个部分。股权和债务发行对行业成分的反应高度显著，表明我们的发现并非由企业决策所解释。由于许多评级产品使用重述或回溯填充的评级，我们的结果基于我们开发的时点评级面板。我们证明，如果使用标准评级产品而非时点数据，研究人员可能会错误地推断出较高的ESG评级会导致资产积累，这尤其归因于标准评级数据产品中使用了重述的ESG评分。

33769.title: Fiscal Redistribution Risk in Treasury Markets
33769.zh_title: 国债市场中的财政再分配风险
33769.authors: Roberto Gomez Cram, Howard Kung, Hanno Lustig, David Zeke
33769.abstract: Unfunded fiscal shocks are a significant source of risk premia in Treasury markets when central banks and governments decide to insulate taxpayers and expose bondholders' wealth to government funding needs. We illustrate this bond risk premium mechanism analytically in a two-agent model featuring monetary-fiscal interactions and a fraction of constrained agents. Surprise government transfer spending devalues real Treasury payoffs through fiscal inflation, while fiscal redistribution makes these high marginal utility states for bond investors, leading to risky government debt. We show that this fiscal redistribution mechanism can quantitatively explain the nominal term premium in a TANK framework.
33769.zh_abstract: 当央行和政府决定保护纳税人并使债券持有人的财富暴露于政府融资需求时，无资金准备的财政冲击是国债市场风险溢价的重要来源。我们在一个包含货币-财政互动和部分受约束代理人的两主体模型中，分析性地阐述了这种债券风险溢价机制。意外的政府转移支付支出通过财政通胀使国债的实际回报贬值，而财政再分配使这些状态对债券投资者而言具有高边际效用，从而导致政府债务具有风险性。我们表明，这种财政再分配机制可以在一个TANK框架中定量解释名义期限溢价。

33768.title: Assessing the Estimands and Estimates of Hospitalization Rates in Health Economics and Clinical Medicine
33768.zh_title: 评估健康经济学和临床医学中住院率的估计目标和估计量
33768.authors: Aditya Jain, Gil Peled, Filip Obradovic, Federico Crippa, Yeshaya Nussbaum, Michael Gmeiner, Daniela Ladner, Charles F. Manski
33768.abstract: Even though data on hospital admissions are widely used in health research, hospitalization-related quantities measured using these data are not always clearly conceptualized. Consequently, estimators of these quantities can have unclear rationales and undesirable properties. We evaluate three rate estimators for measuring hospitalization-related quantities that are of interest in health economics and clinical medicine subspecialities. Using the Grossman human capital model, we motivate the importance of measuring healthy time. We show that an upper bound on healthy time can be calculated using lengths of hospital stay without assumptions about health status outside the hospital. We find that an admission rate conventionally used in clinical research is a patient follow-up time weighted average that lacks a clear basis for the weights. We evaluate the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) use of risk-standardized readmission rates to penalize hospitals under the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (HRRP) and find that it may inadvertently conflict with disease-specific care aimed at reducing mortality risk. We show that risk-standardized rates can be sensitive to patient case mix, potentially leading to hospital rankings that do not reflect hospital quality. We also summarize debates regarding the effectiveness of risk-standardized readmission rates in reducing readmissions.
33768.zh_abstract: 尽管住院数据在健康研究中被广泛使用，但利用这些数据测量的住院相关数量并不总是被清晰概念化。因此，这些数量的估计量可能具有不明确的理由和不良性质。我们评估了三种用于测量健康经济学和临床医学亚专业中感兴趣的住院相关数量的率估计量。利用Grossman人力资本模型，我们论证了衡量健康时间的重要性。我们表明，健康时间的上限可以通过住院时长计算，而无需对院外健康状况做出假设。我们发现，临床研究中常规使用的入院率是一个患者随访时间加权平均值，缺乏明确的权重依据。我们评估了医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心在住院再入院减少计划中使用风险标准化再入院率来惩罚医院的做法，并发现它可能无意中与旨在降低死亡风险的疾病特异性护理相冲突。我们表明，风险标准化率可能对患者病例组合敏感，可能导致医院排名不反映医院质量。我们还总结了关于风险标准化再入院率在减少再入院方面有效性的争论。

33767.title: Universal Pre-K as Economic Stimulus: Evidence from Nine States and Large Cities in the U.S.
33767.zh_title: 作为经济刺激的全民学前班：来自美国九个州和大城市的证据
33767.authors: C. Kirabo Jackson, Julia A. Turner, Jacob Bastian
33767.abstract: While Universal Pre-Kindergarten (UPK) is known to increase maternal labor supply, its broader labor market effects remain understudied. We analyze UPK programs implemented across nine states and cities between 1995 and 2019, exploiting staggered adoption for identification. In conservative specifications, UPK increased Pre-K enrollment by about 10 percentage points and raised labor force participation, employment, and hours worked by roughly 1 percent. Employment effects were largest for mothers (who account for about one-fifth of the total effect) but extended to other groups, especially women. Among adults without young children, effects are strongest for groups that, based on time use data, spend significant time caring for young children—consistent with UPK inducing increased employment among informal child care providers. Impacts vary across settings, with the largest effects in areas providing at least five hours of care per day. UPK increased aggregate earnings by about 0.6% overall, with each dollar spent generating roughly four dollars in additional earnings; this rises to 3%, corresponding to thirteen dollars per dollar spent, for expansions providing five or more hours of care. Accounting for state tax revenue alone, state Marginal Values of Public Funds (MVPF) range from 0.65 to 1.31, while the social MVPF, which also accounts for induced federal tax revenue, ranges from 1.77 to 3.53 across all programs and is infinite for full-time programs that generate sufficient state and federal tax revenue to fully pay for themselves. Results suggest that labor market responses beyond the canonical model that focuses on parents alone lead to sizable economic returns to early childhood education investments.
33767.zh_abstract: 虽然全民学前班已知能增加母亲劳动力供给，但其更广泛的劳动力市场效应仍未得到充分研究。我们分析了1995年至2019年间在九个州和城市实施的全民学前班项目，利用交错实施进行识别。在保守的设定下，全民学前班使学前班入学率提高了约10个百分点，并使劳动力参与率、就业和工作时间增加了约1%。就业效应在母亲中最大（占总效应的约五分之一），但也扩展到其他群体，尤其是女性。在没有幼儿的成年人中，基于时间使用数据，那些花费大量时间照顾幼儿的群体效应最强——这与全民学前班诱导非正式儿童保育提供者增加就业相一致。影响因环境而异，在每天提供至少五小时保育的地区效应最大。全民学前班总体上使总收益增加了约0.6%，每花费一美元大约产生四美元的额外收益；对于提供五小时或以上保育的扩张项目，这一比例上升到3%，相当于每花费一美元产生十三美元。仅考虑州税收收入，各州公共资金边际价值范围从0.65到1.31；而社会公共资金边际价值（同时考虑引致的联邦税收收入）在所有项目中从1.77到3.53不等，对于能产生足够州和联邦税收收入以完全自付的全日制项目，该值为无穷大。结果表明，超出仅关注父母的经典模型的劳动力市场反应，为早期儿童教育投资带来了可观的经济回报。

33766.title: Transformative and Subsistence Entrepreneurs: Origins and Impacts on Economic Growth
33766.zh_title: 变革型与生存型企业家：起源及其对经济增长的影响
33766.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Harun Alp, Jeremy Pearce, Marta Prato
33766.abstract: This paper explores the symbiotic relationship between transformative entrepreneurs and inventors, which is crucial for economic growth. We utilize microdata from Denmark to demonstrate that while the relationship between IQ and general entrepreneurship tends to be negative, it is strongly positive among transformative entrepreneurs. Transformative entrepreneurs, often with higher IQ and education levels, significantly drive R&D and business growth, thereby providing substantial opportunities for inventors. In contrast, average entrepreneurs are more influenced by their family’s entrepreneurship background. Our economic model links these dynamics to overall economic progress, highlighting how higher education influences career paths in entrepreneurship and invention. We identify talent misallocation caused by unequal education access, particularly affecting lower-income families. Our findings indicates the most effective policies strengthen the interplay between higher education, innovation, and entrepreneurship to foster transformative businesses and achieve long-run economic growth.
33766.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了变革型企业家与发明家之间的共生关系，这对经济增长至关重要。我们利用丹麦的微观数据证明，虽然智商与一般创业之间的关系往往是负的，但在变革型企业家中却是强正相关。变革型企业家通常具有更高的智商和教育水平，显著推动研发和业务增长，从而为发明家提供大量机会。相比之下，普通企业家更多地受到其家庭创业背景的影响。我们的经济模型将这些动态与整体经济进步联系起来，强调高等教育如何影响创业和发明的职业路径。我们识别出由教育机会不平等导致的才能错配，尤其影响低收入家庭。我们的发现表明，最有效的政策是加强高等教育、创新和创业之间的相互作用，以培育变革型企业并实现长期经济增长。

33765.title: Management and Firm Dynamism
33765.authors: Raffaella Sadun, Rachel J. Schuh, Jonathan S. Hartley, John Van Reenen, Nicholas Bloom
33765.abstract: We show better-managed firms are more dynamic in plant acquisitions, disposals, openings and closings in U.S. Census and international data. Better-managed firms also birth better-managed plants and improve the performance of the plants they acquire. To explain these findings we build a model with two key elements. First, management is a combination of firm-level management ability (e.g. CEO quality), which can be transferred to all plants, and plant-level management practices, which can be changed through intangible investment (e.g. consulting or training). Second, management both raises productivity and also reduces the operational costs of dynamism: buying, selling, opening and closing plants. We structurally estimate the model on Census microdata, fitting our key dynamic moments, and then use it to establish three additional results. First, mergers and acquisitions raise economy-wide management and productivity by reallocating plants to firms with higher management ability. Banning M&A would depress GDP and management by about 15%. Second, greater product market competition improves both management and productivity by reallocating away from badly managed plants. Finally, management practices account for about 20% of the cross-country productivity differences with the US.
33765.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在美国人口普查和国际数据中，管理更好的公司在工厂收购、处置、开设和关闭方面更具动态性。管理更好的公司还会催生管理更好的工厂，并改善其收购工厂的绩效。为了解释这些发现，我们构建了一个包含两个关键要素的模型。首先，管理是公司层面管理能力（例如CEO素质）和工厂层面管理实践的结合，前者可以转移到所有工厂，后者可以通过无形投资（例如咨询或培训）改变。其次，管理既提高生产率，也降低动态性的运营成本：购买、出售、开设和关闭工厂。我们在人口普查微观数据上对模型进行结构估计，拟合我们的关键动态矩，然后利用该模型建立三个额外结果。首先，并购通过将工厂重新分配给管理能力更高的公司，提高了整个经济的管理水平和生产率。禁止并购将使GDP和管理水平下降约15%。其次，更大的产品市场竞争通过将资源从管理不善的工厂重新分配出去，改善了管理和生产率。最后，管理实践解释了美国与其他国家之间约20%的生产率差异。
33765.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：J0

33764.title: The Impacts of Grade Retention Policy With Minimal Retention
33764.zh_title: 最低留级率下的留级政策影响
33764.authors: Jordan S. Berne, Brian A. Jacob, Christina Weiland, Katharine O. Strunk
33764.abstract: State laws that mandate in-grade retention for struggling readers are widespread in the U.S., covering 34% of public-school third graders in 2023-24. This study investigates the impacts of Michigan’s third-grade reading law on subsequent test scores and school progress outcomes for the 2020-21 and 2021-22 third-grade cohorts. Using a regression discontinuity (RD) design, we find that being flagged for retention raises students’ reading scores in the next school year by 0.045 standard deviations (SD)—a modest but meaningful impact. Because being flagged increases the likelihood of actually being retained by only 3.4 percentage points, the implied effect of retention itself under standard “fuzzy” RD assumptions would be an implausibly large 1.3 SD. This result suggests flagging may affect outcomes via mechanisms other than just retention, a violation of the exclusion restriction. Indeed, we estimate similar effects even in districts that retain no students. Survey evidence suggests flagged students receive more intensive reading support even if they are not retained. Our findings suggest retention may be a much less important component of literacy reforms than previously understood. Finally, given the similarity between Michigan’s reading law and those in other states, our findings raise concerns about potential bias in previously estimated retention effects.
33764.zh_abstract: 美国各州法律强制要求阅读困难学生留级，这一政策覆盖了2023-24学年34%的公立学校三年级学生。本研究利用断点回归设计，调查了密歇根州三年级阅读法对2020-21和2021-22学年三年级学生后续考试成绩和学校进步结果的影响。我们发现，被标记为需要留级会使学生在下一学年的阅读成绩提高0.045个标准差——这是一个适度但有意义的影响。由于被标记仅使实际留级的可能性增加3.4个百分点，在标准“模糊”断点回归假设下，留级本身的隐含效应将达到难以置信的1.3个标准差。这一结果表明，标记可能通过留级以外的机制影响结果，这违反了排除限制条件。事实上，即使在未留级任何学生的学区，我们也估计出类似的影响。调查证据表明，被标记的学生即使未被留级，也会获得更密集的阅读支持。我们的发现表明，留级在读写能力改革中的重要性可能远低于此前认知。最后，鉴于密歇根州阅读法与其他州的相似性，我们的发现对先前估计的留级效应中可能存在的偏误提出了担忧。
33764.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H1, H4, I2, I21, I24, I28, J01

33799.title: Firms’ Inflation and Wage Expectations During the Inflation Surge
33799.zh_title: 通胀飙升期间企业的通胀与工资预期
33799.authors: Erwan Gautier, Frédérique Savignac, Olivier Coibion
33799.abstract: Using a new survey of French firms spanning the full 2020–2025 inflation cycle, we document that de-anchoring and passthrough decoupled during the inflation surge: the firms whose expectations drifted furthest from target were precisely those that did not act on them, while firms that embedded expectations into wages and prices remained relatively well anchored. A growing tail of firms expected persistently high inflation — “inflation disasters” — but these were disproportionately smaller, less attentive firms extrapolating local cost pressures. As a result, the surge in expectations did not generate wage-price dynamics, limiting the scope for a self-sustaining inflation spiral.
33799.zh_abstract: 利用一项覆盖2020-2025年完整通胀周期的新法国企业调查，我们记录了在通胀飙升期间，预期脱锚与传导效应出现脱钩：那些预期偏离目标最远的企业恰恰是那些未据此采取行动的企业，而将预期纳入工资和价格的企业则保持了相对良好的锚定。越来越多的企业预期通胀将持续高企——即“通胀灾难”——但这些企业不成比例地是规模较小、关注度较低的企业，它们只是外推了本地成本压力。因此，预期的飙升并未引发工资-价格动态，限制了自我维持通胀螺旋的可能性。

33798.title: The Long-Run and Intergenerational Effects of Conditional Cash Transfers: Evidence from Chile’s Indigenous Grants
33798.zh_title: 有条件现金转移的长期与代际效应：来自智利土著补助金的证据
33798.authors: Adrienne M. Lucas, Patrick J. McEwan, David Torres Irribarra
33798.abstract: Since 1991, Chile has provided renewable cash transfers to indigenous children enrolled in school. We estimate intent-to-treat effects of expected grant exposure on the recipient generation and their children, exploiting cohort variation in exposure and comparisons to never-treated adults. Fixed effects absorb attributes shared by those born in the same year and community. Cohorts with the greatest exposure had 20 percent higher earnings, and higher labor supply, schooling attainment, and learning per year of school. Maternal exposure improved children’s test scores and grades, and reduced household receipt of indigenous grants and means-tested transfers.
33798.zh_abstract: 自1991年以来，智利向在校就读的土著儿童提供可续期的现金转移。我们估计了预期补助金暴露对受助一代及其子女的意向性治疗效应，利用了暴露程度的队列差异以及与从未接受治疗的成年人的比较。固定效应吸收了同年出生和同一社区人群共有的属性。暴露程度最高的队列收入高出20%，并且劳动供给、教育成就和每年学习成果更高。母亲的暴露改善了子女的考试成绩和年级水平，并减少了家庭对土著补助金和基于经济状况调查的转移支付的领取。
33798.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I24, I28, I38, O10, O15

33797.title: Changes in the College Mobility Pipeline Since 1900
33797.zh_title: 自1900年以来大学流动性管道的变化
33797.abstract: Going to college has consistently conferred a large wage premium. We show that the relative premium received by lower-income Americans has halved since 1960. We decompose this steady rise in ‘collegiate regressivity’ using dozens of survey and administrative datasets documenting 1900–2020 wage premiums and the composition and value-added of collegiate institutions and majors. Three factors explain 80 percent of collegiate regressivity’s growth. First, the teaching-oriented public universities where lower-income students are concentrated have relatively declined in funding, retention, and economic value since 1960. Second, lower-income students have been disproportionately diverted into community and for-profit colleges since 1980 and 1990, respectively. Third, higher-income students’ falling humanities enrollment and rising computer science enrollment since 2000 have increased their degrees’ value. Selection into college-going and across four-year universities are second-order. College-going provided equitable returns before 1960, but collegiate regressivity now curtails higher education’s potential to reduce inequality and mediates 25 percent of intergenerational income transmission.
33797.zh_abstract: 上大学一直带来巨大的工资溢价。我们表明，自1960年以来，低收入美国人获得的相对溢价已减半。我们利用数十个调查和行政数据集（记录了1900-2020年的工资溢价以及大学机构和专业的构成与附加值）分解了这一“大学回归性”的稳步上升。三个因素解释了大学回归性增长的80%。首先，低收入学生集中的教学型公立大学自1960年以来在资金、保留率和经济价值方面相对下降。其次，低收入学生自1980年和1990年以来分别被不成比例地分流到社区学院和营利性大学。第三，自2000年以来，高收入学生人文学科入学率下降和计算机科学入学率上升增加了其学位的价值。进入大学和进入四年制大学的选择是次要因素。上大学在1960年之前提供了公平的回报，但如今大学回归性削弱了高等教育减少不平等的潜力，并介导了25%的代际收入传递。
33797.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I23, I26, J62, N32

33796.title: Firm Quality Dynamics and the Slippery Slope of Credit Intervention
33796.zh_title: 企业质量动态与信贷干预的滑坡效应
33796.abstract: A salient trend in crisis intervention has emerged in recent decades: Government and central banks offered funding directly to nonfinancial firms, bypassing banks and other credit intermediaries. We analyze the long-term consequences of such policies by focusing on firm quality dynamics. In a laissez-faire economy, firms with high productivity are more likely to survive crises than those with low productivity. The government funding support saves more firms but cannot be customized based on firm productivity, dampening the cleansing effect of crises. The policy distortion is self-perpetuating: A downward bias in firm quality distribution necessitates interventions of greater scale in future crises. Our mechanism is quantitatively important: we show that if policy makers ignore such distortionary effects on firm quality dynamics, the resultant credit intervention would almost double the optimal amount.
33796.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，危机干预中出现了一个显著趋势：政府和央行绕过银行及其他信贷中介，直接向非金融企业提供资金。我们通过聚焦企业质量动态来分析此类政策的长期后果。在自由放任经济中，高生产率企业比低生产率企业更有可能在危机中存活。政府资金支持拯救了更多企业，但无法根据企业生产率进行定制化调整，从而削弱了危机的净化效应。这种政策扭曲具有自我延续性：企业质量分布的下行偏差要求未来危机中实施更大规模的干预。我们的机制在数量上具有重要意义：我们表明，如果政策制定者忽视这种对企业质量动态的扭曲效应，由此产生的信贷干预规模将几乎是最优水平的两倍。
33796.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：E50, E60, G01, G18

33788.title: What Economists Should Know about the 340B Drug Discounting Program
33788.zh_title: 经济学家应了解的340B药品折扣计划
33788.abstract: The 340B Drug Pricing Program was instituted to bolster the non-profit health care safety net without relying on taxpayer money. It allows participating health care facilities, called covered entities, to purchase drugs filled at in-house or contracted external pharmacies at discounts from manufacturers. Covered entities, most of which are hospitals, argue that discounts from the program are critical to their ability to provide charity care and unprofitable lines of service. At the same time, with 340B purchases now comprising over 13% of prescription drug sales, drug manufacturers argue that the program has grown beyond its original intent and led to important revenue losses. These manufacturers have responded to the rapid growth in the network of contract pharmacies by enacting restrictions on distribution that in turn led to a flurry of lawsuits and legislative activity. Given the 340B program’s size, importance, and role in ongoing policy debates, it is perhaps surprising that it has received very little attention in economics journals. Our paper reviews the scholarly literature on the 340B program, which lies almost completely in public health and medical journals, with an eye for the gaps in this literature that economics research can help fill. In particular, economists’ causal inference econometric toolkit and theoretical understanding of the role of government intervention can help improve our understanding of 340B’s impacts and lead to more informed policy decisions.
33788.zh_abstract: 340B药品定价计划旨在不依赖纳税人资金的情况下加强非营利医疗安全网。该计划允许参与医疗机构（称为覆盖实体）以折扣价从制造商处购买药品，这些药品可在内部药房或签约的外部药房配发。覆盖实体（其中大部分是医院）认为，该计划的折扣对其提供慈善护理和无利可图的服务项目至关重要。与此同时，由于340B采购目前占处方药销售额的13%以上，药品制造商认为该计划已超出其最初意图，并导致重大收入损失。这些制造商针对合同药房网络的快速增长，对分销实施了限制，这反过来又引发了一系列诉讼和立法活动。鉴于340B计划的规模、重要性以及在当前政策辩论中的作用，令人惊讶的是，它在经济学期刊上受到的关注非常少。我们的论文回顾了关于340B计划的学术文献，这些文献几乎完全发表在公共卫生和医学期刊上，并着眼于这些文献中经济学研究可以帮助填补的空白。特别是，经济学家的因果推断计量经济学工具包以及对政府干预作用的理论理解，有助于提高我们对340B影响的理解，并促成更明智的政策决策。
33788.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, I18, L25, L51
